title: Craftable Spawn Eggs
description: Adds simple crafting recipes for every spawn egg in the game
body:
Adds crafting recipes for every spawn egg. All recipes require an egg and a diamond. The rest of the materials depend on the mob's appearance, drops, characteristics or diet.

Check out the gallery for the recipes

Works well with my [Mineable Spawners](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mineable_spawners) and [Craftable Spawners](https://modrinth.com/datapack/craftable__spawners) data packs

Intended for use with my [more mob drops](https://modrinth.com/datapack/moremobdrops) data pack
